prestazioni: 1JZ-GTE (Rev3) engine build with forged internals: Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 264° camshaft for optimized high-RPM power delivery (targeting 600+ hp on E85 with minimal lag).

Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GTX4202R with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler (JZX100-specific core) and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for precise boost control (32 psi max).

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and a Tomei high-flow fuel rail, controlled via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 1JZ-GTE Rev3 base maps and flex-fuel sensor integration.
estetica: Vertex Lang II JZX100-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser for aggressive stance and aero balance (paired with Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 wheels).

JUN Auto GT-ADVAN front bumper lip with integrated canards and a Veilside Fortune II rear wing (JZX100-specific mounting brackets) for downforce at high speeds (tested in wind tunnel for 120+ mph stability).

Custom interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel, and a full JZX100-specific roll cage (Weld Racing 1.75" DOM tubing) with bolt-in door bars for chassis rigidity and safety.
